member.name: T:PerAspera.GameAPI.UI.UIGamePanel
M:PerAspera.GameAPI.UI.UIGamePanel.#ctor(System.String,UnityEngine.Rect,System.String)
member.summary: Create a new game-style panel.
member.param: Path to sprite in Resources folder (e.g., "UI/BackgroundWindow_2")

member.name: M:PerAspera.GameAPI.UI.UIGamePanel.OnGUI(System.Func{System.Single,System.Single})
member.summary: Render panel with game sprite background.

member.name: T:PerAspera.GameAPI.UI.UIOverlaySystem
P:PerAspera.GameAPI.UI.UIOverlaySystem.PanelRect
member.summary: Panel rectangle (position and size).

member.name: P:PerAspera.GameAPI.UI.UIOverlaySystem.IsVisible
member.summary: Is panel visible.

member.name: M:PerAspera.GameAPI.UI.UIOverlaySystem.#ctor(System.String,UnityEngine.Rect,UnityEngine.Sprite)
member.summary: Create a new overlay panel.

member.name: M:PerAspera.GameAPI.UI.UIOverlaySystem.SetBackgroundSprite(UnityEngine.Sprite)
member.summary: Set custom background sprite from game.

member.name: M:PerAspera.GameAPI.UI.UIOverlaySystem.SetContentDrawer(System.Func{System.Single,System.Single})
member.summary: Register content drawer callback (receives Y position, returns next Y).

member.name: M:PerAspera.GameAPI.UI.UIOverlaySystem.OnGUI(System.Func{System.Single,System.Single})
member.summary: Render the overlay panel.

member.name: M:PerAspera.GameAPI.UI.UIOverlaySystem.Toggle
member.summary: Toggle panel visibility.

member.name: M:PerAspera.GameAPI.UI.UIOverlaySystem.ResetPosition(UnityEngine.Rect)
member.summary: Reset to initial position.

member.name: T:PerAspera.GameAPI.UI.UIPanel
P:PerAspera.GameAPI.UI.UIPanel.IsVisible
member.summary: Is the panel currently visible?

member.name: P:PerAspera.GameAPI.UI.UIPanel.WindowRect
member.summary: Current window rectangle (position and size)

member.name: P:PerAspera.GameAPI.UI.UIPanel.Title
member.summary: Panel title

member.name: M:PerAspera.GameAPI.UI.UIPanel.#ctor(System.String,UnityEngine.Rect)
member.summary: Create a new draggable panel.

member.name: M:PerAspera.GameAPI.UI.UIPanel.OnGUI(System.Action)
member.summary: Render the panel with custom content.
member.param: Callback function to render panel content via GUILayout

member.name: M:PerAspera.GameAPI.UI.UIPanel.Toggle
member.summary: Toggle panel visibility.

member.name: M:PerAspera.GameAPI.UI.UIPanel.CenterOnScreen(System.Single,System.Single)
member.summary: Center panel on screen.

member.name: T:PerAspera.GameAPI.UI.UIResourceRow
member.summary:
A single row displaying resource information (label + quantity + optional bar). Standardized layout matching in-game resource displays.
UIResourceRow.DrawRow("Oxygen", 150.5f); UIResourceRow.DrawRow("Water", 75.2f, 100f); // With max for bar

member.name: M:PerAspera.GameAPI.UI.UIResourceRow.DrawRow(System.String,System.Single,System.String)
member.summary: Draw a simple resource row with label and quantity.

member.name: M:PerAspera.GameAPI.UI.UIResourceRow.DrawRowWithBar(System.String,System.Single,System.Single,System.String)
member.summary: Draw a resource row with a progress bar.

member.name: M:PerAspera.GameAPI.UI.UIResourceRow.DrawRowWithStatus(System.String,System.Single,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Draw a resource row with status indicator.

member.name: M:PerAspera.GameAPI.UI.UIResourceRow.DrawProgressBar(System.Single,System.Single,UnityEngine.GUILayoutOption[])
member.summary: Draw a simple progress bar (used internally).

member.name: T:PerAspera.GameAPI.UI.UISceneHelper
member.summary: Helper to find and cache UI panel instances in the game scene. Centralizes discovery of native UI elements.

member.name: M:PerAspera.GameAPI.UI.UISceneHelper.FindPanelByType(System.String)
member.summary: Find a panel instance by type name.

member.name: M:PerAspera.GameAPI.UI.UISceneHelper.FindBuildingScreenPanel
member.summary: Find BuildingScreenPanel specifically.

member.name: M:PerAspera.GameAPI.UI.UISceneHelper.ScanAvailablePanels
member.summary: Find all panel types in the scene.

member.name: M:PerAspera.GameAPI.UI.UISceneHelper.ClearCache
member.summary: Clear the panel cache (useful after scene loads).

member.name: M:PerAspera.GameAPI.UI.UISceneHelper.GetCacheStats
member.summary: Get cache statistics.

member.name: T:PerAspera.GameAPI.UI.UISimplePanel
M:PerAspera.GameAPI.UI.UISimplePanel.#ctor(System.String,UnityEngine.Rect)
member.summary: Create a new simple panel.

member.name: M:PerAspera.GameAPI.UI.UISimplePanel.OnGUI(System.Func{System.Single,System.Single})
member.summary: Render panel. ContentDrawer receives Y position and returns next Y position.

member.name: T:PerAspera.GameAPI.UI.UISimpleRow
M:PerAspera.GameAPI.UI.UISimpleRow.DrawLabel(UnityEngine.Rect,System.Single,System.String)
member.summary: Draw a simple label. Returns next Y position.

member.name: M:PerAspera.GameAPI.UI.UISimpleRow.DrawRow(UnityEngine.Rect,System.Single,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Draw a label + value row (label left, value right). Returns next Y position.

member.name: M:PerAspera.GameAPI.UI.UISimpleRow.DrawButton(UnityEngine.Rect,System.Single,System.String,System.Action)
member.summary: Draw a button. Returns next Y position.

member.name: M:PerAspera.GameAPI.UI.UISimpleRow.DrawTextField(UnityEngine.Rect,System.Single,System.String,System.String@)
member.summary: Draw a text field. Returns next Y position.

member.name: M:PerAspera.GameAPI.UI.UISimpleRow.DrawSeparator(UnityEngine.Rect,System.Single)
member.summary: Draw a separator line. Returns next Y position.

member.name: M:PerAspera.GameAPI.UI.UISimpleRow.DrawSpacer(System.Single,System.Single)
member.summary: Draw a spacer. Returns next Y position.

member.name: T:PerAspera.GameAPI.UI.UIColors
member.summary: Standardized color palette for Per Aspera UI components. Matches the visual style of in-game panels (POI Browser, Stock, Demand & Production).
member.example: var color = UIColors.Primary; // Cyan for values var warning = UIColors.Warning; // Orange for warnings

member.name: F:PerAspera.GameAPI.UI.UIColors.Primary
member.summary: Primary value color (cyan) - used for resource quantities, main stats

member.name: F:PerAspera.GameAPI.UI.UIColors.Secondary
member.summary: Secondary/neutral text (white) - used for labels and standard text

member.name: F:PerAspera.GameAPI.UI.UIColors.Warning
member.summary: Warning color (orange) - used for alerts and cautionary information

member.name: F:PerAspera.GameAPI.UI.UIColors.Error
member.summary: Error/critical color (red) - used for critical alerts and errors

member.name: F:PerAspera.GameAPI.UI.UIColors.Success
member.summary: Success color (green) - used for completed or positive states

member.name: F:PerAspera.GameAPI.UI.UIColors.PanelBackground
member.summary: Panel background color (dark blue-grey) - matches game panels

member.name: F:PerAspera.GameAPI.UI.UIColors.PanelBorder
member.summary: Panel border color (light cream/beige)

member.name: F:PerAspera.GameAPI.UI.UIColors.Disabled
member.summary: Disabled/inactive color (grey)

member.name: M:PerAspera.GameAPI.UI.UIColors.GetStatusColor(System.String)
member.summary: Get color based on status (OK, Warning, Error).
member.returns: Corresponding color, defaults to Secondary if status not recognized

member.name: M:PerAspera.GameAPI.UI.UIColors.GetTemperatureColor(System.Single)
member.summary: Get color based on temperature gradient (cold → hot). Value range: -150 to 150 (Mars temperature in Celsius).
member.returns: Color interpolated between blue (cold) → cyan → yellow → red (hot)

member.name: M:PerAspera.GameAPI.UI.UIColors.WithAlpha(UnityEngine.Color,System.Single)
member.summary: Get a semi-transparent version of a color.

member.name: T:PerAspera.GameAPI.UI.UIStyles
P:PerAspera.GameAPI.UI.UIStyles.Header
member.summary: Header style - bold white text, 14pt, for panel titles

member.name: P:PerAspera.GameAPI.UI.UIStyles.Label
member.summary: Label style - white text, 11pt, for resource names and descriptions

member.name: P:PerAspera.GameAPI.UI.UIStyles.Value
member.summary: Value style - cyan text, bold, 11pt, for numeric values

member.name: P:PerAspera.GameAPI.UI.UIStyles.Warning
member.summary: Warning style - orange text, 10pt, for warning messages

member.name: P:PerAspera.GameAPI.UI.UIStyles.Error
member.summary: Error style - red text, bold, 10pt, for error messages

member.name: P:PerAspera.GameAPI.UI.UIStyles.Button
member.summary: Button style - standard button with custom colors

member.name: M:PerAspera.GameAPI.UI.UIStyles.Reset
member.summary: Force reinitialize all styles (useful for theme changes or testing).
